doc_go_contract: one-shot end-to-end indexing pass: collection, source-local projection, relationship-evidence backfill, deployment-mapping reopen, and IaC reachability materialization
kubernetes_shape: one-shot local helper / job / init step; NOT a steady-state Kubernetes workload

phase_1.name: Collection + pipelined first-pass reduction
phase_1.description: drainCollector runs via GitSource.Next + CommitScopeGeneration. Concurrently, drainProjectorPipelined claims projector queue items and runs source-local projection (graph writes + content writes + reducer intent enqueue). deployment_mapping work items may finish or remain pending because backward relationship evidence is not yet committed.
phase_1.signal: collectorDone channel closed when drainCollector returns

phase_2.name: Relationship-evidence backfill
phase_2.description: Called on bootstrapCommitter after collector goroutine completes (before projector drains). Populates relationship_evidence_facts and publishes backward_evidence_committed readiness rows. Defined on postgres.IngestionStore; called here as cd.committer.BackfillAllRelationshipEvidence.

phase_3_prereq.name: Wait for projector drain
phase_3_prereq.description: runPipelined waits for drainProjectorPipelined to return before issuing the reopen call. This prevents deployment_mapping items emitted after the reopen pass from missing reopening.

phase_3_iac.name: IaC reachability materialization
phase_3_iac.description: MaterializeIaCReachability classifies active-generation IaC usage corpus-wide and writes reachability rows. Called after projector drains.

phase_4.name: Deployment-mapping reopen
phase_4.description: ReopenDeploymentMappingWorkItems reopens succeeded deployment_mapping work items so the reducer can rerun them against the now-committed relationship evidence and create resolved_relationships. Only succeeded items are reopened; in-flight stragglers at reopen time are NOT automatically replayed.
phase_4.straggler_note: A small number of in-flight items may succeed between BackfillAllRelationshipEvidence and the reopen pass. These require manual admin replay or a future automated straggler-replay mechanism.

concurrency_model.pipeline: collector and projector run in concurrent goroutines; collectorDone channel coordinates drain-mode transition
concurrency_model.projector_workers: N goroutines compete via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED; controlled by PCG_PROJECTION_WORKERS
concurrency_model.drain_mode: drainingWorkSource counts consecutive empty polls after collectorDone is closed; exits after maxEmptyPolls=5
concurrency_model.heartbeat: startBootstrapProjectorHeartbeat renews projector leases during long graph writes; interval = leaseDuration/3 capped at 1 minute

key_functions.name: run
key_functions.role: wires telemetry, Postgres, graph backend, collector, projector deps then calls runPipelined

key_functions.name: runPipelined
key_functions.role: four-phase orchestrator: pipelined Phase 1, Phase 2 backfill, IaC materialization, Phase 4 reopen

key_functions.name: drainCollector
key_functions.role: loops source.Next + committer.CommitScopeGeneration until no more work

key_functions.name: drainProjectorPipelined
key_functions.role: wraps drainProjector with drain-then-exit via drainingWorkSource

key_functions.name: drainProjector
key_functions.role: N-worker concurrent projection loop; 1-worker falls back to drainProjectorSequential

key_functions.name: drainProjectorWorkItem
key_functions.role: claim → load facts → project → ack; full OTEL instrumentation per item

key_functions.name: buildBootstrapProjector
key_functions.role: constructs projector.Runtime with PhasePublisher and RepairQueue

key_functions.name: bootstrapCanonicalExecutorForGraphBackend
key_functions.role: wraps rawExecutor with instrumentation, retry, timeout; NornicDB adds phase-group chunking

key_functions.name: startBootstrapProjectorHeartbeat
key_functions.role: renews projector lease at interval during long graph writes

key_functions.name: writeDiscoveryAdvisoryReports
key_functions.role: writes collected discovery advisory reports to PCG_DISCOVERY_REPORT path as JSON

key_functions.name: recordBootstrapProjectionResult
key_functions.role: records metrics + span + structured log for a single projection work item

sentinels.name: errProjectorDrained
sentinels.meaning: queue is empty; signals clean exit from drainProjectorWorkItem

env_vars.PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND: neo4j or nornicdb; default nornicdb; invalid value fails at startup
env_vars.PCG_DISCOVERY_REPORT: file path to write discovery advisory JSON; empty disables (main.go:163)
env_vars.PCG_CANONICAL_WRITE_TIMEOUT: graph write timeout; default 30s for NornicDB (nornicdb_wiring.go:341)
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_CANONICAL_GROUPED_WRITES: enable NornicDB grouped canonical writes; default false; conformance gate required before production use (nornicdb_wiring.go:353)
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_PHASE_GROUP_STATEMENTS: NornicDB phase group statement cap; default 500
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_FILE_PHASE_GROUP_STATEMENTS: NornicDB file-phase group statement cap; default 5
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_FILE_BATCH_SIZE: NornicDB file upsert row cap; default 100
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_ENTITY_PHASE_GROUP_STATEMEN: NornicDB entity-phase group statement cap; default 25
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_ENTITY_BATCH_SIZE: NornicDB entity upsert row cap; default 100
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_ENTITY_LABEL_BATCH_SIZES: per-label batch size overrides as Label=size,... entries
env_vars.PCG_NORNICDB_ENTITY_LABEL_PHASE_GROUP_ST: per-label phase group statement overrides as Label=size,... entries

metrics.name: instruments.PipelineOverlapDuration
metrics.note: records collection+projection overlap; no canonical pcg_dp_ name — check telemetry.Instruments for final name

signal_handling: none; pcg-bootstrap-index is a one-shot binary; it exits 0 on success or 1 on error via os.Exit(1)

exit_codes.1: any non-nil error from run(); logged via slog.Error before exit

adr_references.what_it_says: Adopted deferred bootstrap backfill with SkipRelationshipBackfill + one deferred BackfillAllRelationshipEvidence pass + ReopenDeploymentMappingWorkItems. Status: Implemented; workstream closed.
Atomic write and deferred backfill constraints that bound the ordering of phases in bootstrap-index.
NornicDB backend evaluation; bootstrap-index uses the same backend-neutral CanonicalNodeWriter surface.

gotchas: SkipRelationshipBackfill=true on committer — per-commit backfill is suppressed; the single deferred BackfillAllRelationshipEvidence call does all relationship evidence work.
Phase ordering is strict: backfill must complete before projector drains, projector must drain before reopen, reopen must complete before exit.
In-flight deployment_mapping items that succeed between BackfillAllRelationshipEvidence and ReopenDeploymentMappingWorkItems are NOT replayed automatically; operator manual replay is required.
No /metrics HTTP surface; metrics are only exported via OTEL (OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT).
PCG_NORNICDB_CANONICAL_GROUPED_WRITES defaults to false; enabling it in bootstrap without conformance evidence carries the same rollback/timeout risks as the ingester path.
drainProjectorPipelined uses maxEmptyPolls=5 with 500ms poll interval to decide the queue is empty; in very slow databases this can cause premature exit.
collectorDone is a chan struct{} — it is closed (not sent to) when drainCollector returns; drainingWorkSource.Claim uses a select on it.
